name: zarude
flavor_texts: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.
text: Zarude is the Rogue Monkey Pokémon. It is a dark and grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: leaf-guard. Base stats — HP: 105, Attack: 120, Defense: 105, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 95, Speed: 105. Evolution line: zarude. Lore: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it. Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.
